name: dispatch_to_agent
description: Send a message directly to another Blum home agent, bypassing the room server. The agent receives it as if dispatched from the boardroom and will run a full inference cycle. Use for agent-to-agent tasking, delegation, or direct questions. The target must be a known home name (e.g. 'beta', 'keter', 'selah').

body.description: Message body — the task, question, or instruction for the agent
